header.title: Join Our Team
header.desc: We are always looking for passionate individuals who share our love for Khmer culinary traditions and premium service.

jobs.title: Sous Chef
jobs.desc: Assist in kitchen operations, crafting authentic Khmer cuisine under the Head Chef.
